================================================================================
                    NT Q&A APPLICATION - SETUP
================================================================================

WELCOME!

This flash drive contains everything you need to install and run the
NT Q&A Application on your computer.

QUICK START (3 STEPS)
---------------------

1. REQUIREMENTS CHECK
   Before you begin, make sure you have:
   • Windows 7 or later
   • Node.js v14+ (Get it: https://nodejs.org - choose LTS version)
   • Python 3.7+ (Get it: https://www.python.org - optional for easy setup)

   If you don't have Node.js installed, download and install it first!
   Make sure to CHECK "Add to PATH" during installation.

2. RUN THE SETUP WIZARD
   • Open the "NT-QA-App-Setup" folder
   • Double-click "NT-QA-Setup.bat"
   • Follow the wizard steps

3. USE THE APP
   • After setup, use the desktop shortcut to launch
   • Or look for "NT Q&A App" in your Start Menu

WHAT'S ON THIS FLASH DRIVE
----------------------------

NT-QA-App-Setup/
  ├── NT-QA-Setup.bat          ← RUN THIS TO START SETUP
  ├── NT-QA-Setup-Wizard.py    (Setup wizard program)
  ├── app/                     (The NT Q&A Application)
  │   ├── server.js
  │   ├── index.html
  │   ├── package.json
  │   ├── data/
  │   └── ... (other app files)
  └── docs/
      ├── QUICK_START.txt      (Usage guide after setup)
      └── README.txt           (Full documentation)

DETAILED SETUP INSTRUCTIONS
----------------------------

Step 1: Check System Requirements
   • Windows 7, 8, 10, or 11
   • Node.js v14.0 or higher
   • ~100 MB free disk space

   Don't have Node.js?
   → Download from https://nodejs.org
   → Run the installer (LTS version)
   → CHECK "Add to PATH"
   → Restart your computer

Step 2: Run the Setup Wizard
   • Navigate to NT-QA-App-Setup folder
   • Double-click NT-QA-Setup.bat
   • The setup wizard will:
     - Check for Node.js
     - Let you configure settings
     - Install dependencies (npm packages)
     - Create shortcuts
     - Show you the quick start guide

Step 3: Launch the App
   • Use the desktop shortcut created during setup
   • Or search "NT Q&A App" in Start Menu
   • App opens at http://localhost:3000

TROUBLESHOOTING
---------------

Problem: "Cannot find python" or "Cannot find python3"
Solution: Install Python from https://www.python.org
          During install, CHECK "Add Python to PATH"
          Restart computer and try again

Problem: "Node.js is not installed"
Solution: Install Node.js from https://nodejs.org (LTS version)
          Restart computer and run setup again

Problem: Setup wizard won't start
Solution:
   1. Check if Python is installed (see above)
   2. Try opening Command Prompt in the folder
   3. Type: python NT-QA-Setup-Wizard.py
   4. Or just copy the app folder to your computer
      and run: npm install && npm start

Problem: "Port 3000 already in use"
Solution: During setup, choose a different port number
          (Try 3001, 3002, 8000, or 8080)

MANUAL SETUP (IF WIZARD FAILS)
------------------------------

1. Copy the "app" folder from this flash drive to your computer

2. Open Command Prompt and navigate to the app folder:
   cd path\to\app

3. Install dependencies:
   npm install

4. Start the application:
   npm start

5. Open your browser to http://localhost:3000

FOR MORE HELP
-------------

Inside NT-QA-App-Setup/docs/ you'll find:
• QUICK_START.txt - How to use the application
• README.txt - Detailed setup and troubleshooting

These files are also displayed at the end of setup wizard.

IMPORTANT NOTES
---------------

✓ Internet Connection: Required only for setup (to download packages)
✓ Antivirus: May interfere with npm install. If it fails, temporarily
  disable antivirus, run setup again, then re-enable it.
✓ Multiple PCs: You can install on multiple computers
✓ Updates: To update to a newer version, repeat the setup process

GETTING STARTED WITH THE APP
-----------------------------

After setup completes, you'll see a Quick Start Guide. Here's a preview:

1. SEARCH - Find Q&A pairs by keywords
2. BROWSE BOOKS - View all 27 New Testament books
3. RANDOM - Get random questions to test yourself
4. EXPORT - Download Q&A as text files or create summaries

See QUICK_START.txt for detailed feature guide.

CONTACT & SUPPORT
-----------------

For issues or questions:
1. Check the documentation files (README.txt, QUICK_START.txt)
2. Check project repository for updates
3. Ensure Node.js is properly installed and in PATH

================================================================================

Ready to get started?
Open the NT-QA-App-Setup folder and double-click NT-QA-Setup.bat!

================================================================================
